title: Book 1 - Lesson 1 - Hello! This Is Me

blocks.content: Welcome! In this first lesson, you learn how to start a conversation, say your name, ask simple questions, answer about yourself, and make a short introduction in English.

messages.speaker: Emma
messages.text: My name is Emma. What's your name?

cards.backText: Use these expressions to start a conversation.

expressions: Good morning! / Good afternoon! / Good evening!
cards.backText: Use these expressions depending on the time of day.

expressions: My name is... / I am... / I'm...
cards.backText: Use these expressions to say your name.
Use this question to ask a person's name.

expressions: Nice to meet you. / Nice to meet you too.
cards.backText: Use these expressions when you meet a person for the first time.
Use these expressions to finish a conversation.

blocks.text:
A: Hello!
B: []!
A: My name is Ana. What's your []?
B: My name is Bruno.
A: Nice to [] you.
B: Nice to meet you [].

blocks.question: Choose the best answer: Nice to meet you.

blocks.content: Use Do you...? to ask about actions, routines, and preferences. In this part, use only Do you...? with you.

blocks.title: Question Pattern: Do You...?
blocks.explanation: Use Do you + action to make a simple question.
blocks.details: Answer with Yes, I do. or No, I don't.

blocks.title: Short Answers with Do
blocks.explanation: Use a short answer first. Then you can add extra information.
blocks.details: Keep the same answer pattern every time in this part.

cells.text: Yes, I do. I study at night.
No, I don't. I study in the morning.
Yes, I do. I like pop music.

blocks.text:
[] you study English?
Yes, I [].
No, I [].

Do you [] English?
Do you [] music?
Do you [] games?
Do you [] movies?

blocks.question: Choose the correct answer: Do you work?
Choose the correct answer: Do you like music?

blocks.title: Listen and Answer: Sofia
blocks.transcript: Lucas: Hi, Sofia. Do you study English? Sofia: Yes, I do. I study English at night. Lucas: Do you work? Sofia: No, I don't. I'm a student. Lucas: Do you like music? Sofia: Yes, I do. I like pop music. Lucas: Do you play games? Sofia: No, I don't. I watch movies.

questions.question: What kind of music is in the dialogue?

blocks.content: This page gives more practice with the same question form. Do not change the pattern yet.

messages.speaker: Ana
messages.text: Do you study in the morning?

messages.speaker: Bruno
messages.text: No, I don't. I study at night.

messages.speaker: Bruno
messages.text: Yes, I do. I like coffee.

substitutionBox.original: Do you study in the morning?

blocks.text:
[] you study at night?
[] you work in the morning?
[] you like coffee?
[] you watch series?
[] you read books?

blocks.question: Select the question about an action.

blocks.title: A Short Routine
blocks.text: Hi! My name is Pedro. I study English at night. I work in the afternoon. I like music and movies. I don't play games, but I watch series on Saturday.

blocks.title: Fast Question Practice
prompts: Ask: Do you study at night?
Answer: Yes, I do. / No, I don't.
Answer: Yes, I do. / No, I don't.
Answer: Yes, I do. / No, I don't.

blocks.content: After saying hello, people often ask how you are. Use a short feeling word to answer.

cards.backText: Use this when you need rest.
Use this when you feel happy.
Use this before a test, presentation, or new situation.

blocks.title: How Are You?
blocks.ruleContext: Ask: How are you? Answer: I'm + feeling. Then ask back: And you?
blocks.expandableContent:
A: How are you?
B: I'm good, thanks. And you?
A: I'm fine.

blocks.text:
A: How [] you?
B: I'm [], thanks. And []?
A: I'm fine.

blocks.question: Choose the best answer: How are you?

blocks.content: Now use Are you...? for identity, feelings, condition, nationality, and origin. This is a different question pattern from Do you...?.

blocks.title: Question Pattern: Are You...?
blocks.explanation: Use Are you + information to ask about a person.
blocks.details: Use this pattern for a student, a teacher, tired, happy, Brazilian, and from Brazil.

cells.text: Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.

blocks.title: Do You...? or Are You...?
blocks.explanation: Use Do you...? for actions. Use Are you...? for information about the person.
blocks.details: Look at the first words and the answer.

blocks.text:
[] you a student?
[] you tired?
[] you happy?
[] you from Brazil?

Are you a student?
Yes, I [].
Are you tired?
No, I'm [].
Are you from Brazil?
Yes, I [].

blocks.question: Choose the correct answer: Are you a student?
Choose the correct answer: Are you tired?

messages.speaker: Ana
messages.text: Do you study English at night?

blocks.title: Are You...? Speaking Round
prompts: Answer with Yes, I am. or No, I'm not.

blocks.content: Use Are you from...? to check a country or city. Use Where are you from? when you need the place.

blocks.title: Origin Questions
blocks.explanation: Use from with a country or city.
blocks.details: Use Are you from...? for yes/no. Use Where are you from? for information.

cells.text: Yes, I am. I'm from Brazil.
No, I'm not. I'm from Brazil.

blocks.title: Match the Country and the Nationality

blocks.text:
A: Are you [] Brazil?
B: Yes, I [].
A: Where are you []?
B: I'm [] São Paulo.
A: Are you Brazilian?
B: Yes, I [].

messages.speaker: Ben
messages.text: Yes, I am. I'm from Toronto.

blocks.title: Listen: Countries and Cities
blocks.transcript: Hello! I'm Kenji. I'm from Japan. I'm Japanese. This is Laura. She is from Mexico. She is Mexican. We study English together.

blocks.title: Origin Practice
prompts: Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.

blocks.content: Now connect the lesson pieces to make a short personal profile.

blocks.title: Personal Profile Patterns
blocks.ruleContext: Use these sentence models to build a first personal introduction.
blocks.expandableContent:
My name is Julia.
I'm 22 years old.
I'm from Brazil.
I'm Brazilian.
I'm a student.
I study English at night.
I like music and coffee.
I'm good today.

blocks.title: Personal Information
blocks.explanation: Use one short sentence for each piece of information.
blocks.details: Replace the examples with real information.

blocks.title: Meet Daniel
blocks.text: Hello! My name is Daniel. I'm 23 years old. I'm from Recife, Brazil. I'm Brazilian. I'm a student. I study English in the evening. I like soccer, music, and movies. I'm happy today.

Hello! My [] is Ana.
I'm 21 years [].
I'm [] São Paulo, Brazil.
I'm Brazilian.
I'm a [].
I [] English at night.
I [] music and movies.
I'm happy today.

blocks.title: Write a Mini Profile
blocks.prompt: Write 5 to 7 short sentences about yourself. Include your name, age, city or country, nationality, occupation, one thing you study, and one thing you like.

blocks.content: This interview connects greetings, Do you...?, Are you...?, and Where are you from?.

messages.speaker: Sofia
messages.text: Yes, I am. I'm from São Paulo.

blocks.title: Interview Models
blocks.explanation: Use these questions to learn basic information about another person.
blocks.details: Notice the answer pattern for each question.

blocks.text:
A: What's your []?
B: My name is Carla.
A: Are you [] Brazil?
B: Yes, I [].
A: Where are you from?
B: I'm [] São Paulo.
A: Do you [] English?
B: Yes, I [].
A: Are you a student?
B: Yes, I [].

blocks.title: Listen: A Short Personal Introduction
blocks.transcript: Hi! My name is Sofia. I'm 20 years old. I'm from São Paulo, Brazil. I'm Brazilian. I'm a student. I study English at night. I like music and movies. I'm good today.

blocks.content: Review the main chunks. Then produce a short introduction and a short interview.

words.translation: Eu sou do Brasil. Eu sou brasileiro/brasileira.

blocks.title: Final Reading: Meet Camila
blocks.text: Hi! My name is Camila. I'm 24 years old. I'm from Curitiba, Brazil. I'm Brazilian. I'm a receptionist. I study English after work. I like music, series, and coffee. I'm usually busy, but I'm happy today.

blocks.title: My First English Introduction
blocks.prompt: Write a final self-introduction with 6 to 8 sentences. Include a greeting, your name, age, city or country, nationality, what you do, one or two things you like, and how you feel today.

blocks.title: Final Speaking Round
prompts: Ask your partner how they are.
Ask where your partner is from.
Ask if your partner studies English.
Say one thing from your profile.

blocks.title: Final Output Model
blocks.ruleContext: Use this model as the final expected production for Lesson 1.
blocks.expandableContent:
Hello!
My name is Ana.
I'm 21 years old.
I'm from São Paulo, Brazil.
I'm Brazilian.
I'm a student.
I study English at night.
I like music and movies.
I'm happy today.
